name: Chicken Jambalaya
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon dried basil and thyme, crushed
2 cups cooked chicken or turkey, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, cook celery, onion, garlic, and green pepper in butter or margarine until vegetables are tender.
2. Stir in the undrained tomatoes, chicken broth, rice, basil, thyme, Cajun seasoning, black cayenne pepper, tabasco sauce, and bay leaf.
3. Bring to a boil; reduce heat.
4. Cover and simmer about 20 minutes or until rice is tender.
5. Stir in cooked chicken or turkey; cook until heated through.
6. Discard the bay leaf.
